title: rhamnus × hybrida
intro: Rhamnus × hybrida, also known as the buckthorn or alder buckthorn, is a hybrid shrub that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of anthraquinones, which have laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rhamnus × hybrida include its ability to support digestive health, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Rhamnus × hybrida can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, often used to treat constipation, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues.
